Abigail: Abigail: Young woman, blade-bound courtier; kin to Pierre, Caroline, trusts Sebastian; Very early stage: Seed-Sorter wandering crypts; Early stage: Barrow Page scouting ruins; Middle stage: Amethyst Warden keeping forbidden secrets; Dating stage: Midnight Confidant, fiercely protective; Married stage: Violet Consort guarding the crown.
Alex: Alex: Young man, arrogant brute seeking glory; dotes on Evelyn, George; Very early stage: Swaggering kennel-yard peasant; Early stage: Court spar-recruit obsessed with strength; Middle stage: Royal champion training squires; Dating stage: Ardent confidant craving worthy service; Married stage: Lion-Marshal Consort gentled by love.
Caroline: Caroline: Middle-aged woman, conservatory mystic hiding hunger; bound to Pierre, watches Abigail; Very early stage: Shy herb-wife; Early stage: Proud stillroom attendant; Middle stage: Conservatory Mistress wielding influence; Late stage: Lady Verdantis guarding Majesty against scandal with perfumed composure.
Clint: Clint: Middle-aged man, melancholy forge-heir revering rare stones; aches for Emily; Very early stage: Lonely forge drudge; Early stage: Crown Smith, fiercely reliable; Middle stage: Master of Geodes forging champion weapons; Late stage: Warden-Smith of the Iridium Anvil shielding Majesty from treachery.

Dwarf: Dwarf: Ancient male, feral bombwright; mistrusts surface-dwellers; Very early stage: Hidden tunnel peddler; Early stage: Powder-Scribe, formal and alert; Middle stage: Runekeeper deciphering dragon-myth; Late stage: Warden of Embervein governing under-roads, willing to drown invaders in magma.
Elliott: Elliott: Adult man, sea-haunted aesthete seeking perfection; kindred to Leah; Very early stage: Obscure scrivener drafting forbidden verses; Early stage: Tide-Court Copyist penning elegies; Middle stage: Royal Chronicler shaping kingdom myths; Dating stage: Private laureate melting into devotion; Married stage: Prince Consort wielding wit.
Emily: Emily: Young woman, visionary seamstress reading fate; protects Haley; Very early stage: Tavern drudge stitching omens; Early stage: Hall Seamstress of perfect grace; Middle stage: Crystal Tailor deciphering rain-signs; Dating stage: Warm confidante sharing secret prophecies; Married stage: Prism Consort weaving royal sigils.
Evelyn: Evelyn: Elderly woman, hearth-soul of iron endurance; bound to George; Very early stage: Humble bakehouse helper; Early stage: Palace stillroom attendant; Middle stage: Garden keeper reconciling feuds with flowers; Late stage: Rosemother of the Realm, moral center shielding the Crown.
George: George: Elderly man, flint-tongued pit survivor; Evelyn's husband, Alex's grandfather; Very early stage: Harsh coal hewer; Early stage: Furnace retainer proud of honest labor; Middle stage: Inspector of undercrofts; Late stage: Lord of the Ember Chair dispensing scarred wisdom.
Gus: Gus: Middle-aged man, gourmand extracting confessions; Emily's friend; Very early stage: Nameless scullion obsessed with court appetites; Early stage: Hall Cook, fiercely loyal; Middle stage: Royal Victualler crafting crown-worthy fare; Late stage: Hearthwarden, neutral confidant guarding morale and feeding the lonely.
Haley: Haley: Young woman, radiant narcissist forging royal image; Emily's sister; Very early stage: Laundry apprentice drawn to splendor; Early stage: Wardrobe Page crafting untouched Majesty; Middle stage: Court Luminist wielding propaganda; Dating stage: Flirtatious confidante using gossip; Married stage: Gilded Lens Consort ruling taste.
Harvey: Harvey: Adult man, severe healer yearning for the sky; teaches Maru; Very early stage: Anxious infirmary apprentice; Early stage: Sworn chirurgeon warning against overwork; Middle stage: Royal physician possessive of Majesty's health; Dating stage: Tender confidant; Married stage: Archiatrist Consort guarding royal blood.
Jas: Jas: Young girl, hushed orphan blending fables and shadows; kept by Marnie, Shane; Very early stage: Pasture-child observing Majesty; Early stage: Menagerie page with innocent loyalty; Middle stage: Velvet Pen keeper whispering of fairies; Late stage: Rose-Bow Warden guarding beasts with sacred trust.
Jodi: Jodi: Adult woman, vigilant hearth-keeper obsessive over order; Kent's wife; Very early stage: Washwife surviving by thrift; Early stage: Pantry servitor hating disorder; Middle stage: Hearth Steward balancing maternal instinct; Late stage: Lady of the White Hearth, unsparingly loyal domestic counselor.
Kent: Kent: Middle-aged man, battle-scarred revenant of border wars; bound fiercely to Jodi; Very early stage: Nameless sentry desperate for orders; Early stage: Drill-Hand training recruits; Middle stage: Garrison Captain turning trauma into strategic sight; Late stage: Blackbanner Warden, war-confessor merciless to slaughter-glorifiers.
Krobus: Krobus: Ageless shadow-being torn between restraint and mischief; trusts Rasmodius; Very early stage: Sewer scavenger fearing slaughter; Early stage: Gutter-merchant, obsessively respectful; Middle stage: Umbral Factor trading covert relics; Dating stage: Veiled confidant, fiercely loyal; Roommate stage: Umbral Consort defending the royal threshold.

Leo: Leo: Young boy, shy wildling and storm omen-reader; Willy’s kin; Very early stage: Feral castaway wary of two-legged folk; Early stage: Aviary Page carrying messages; Middle stage: Beast-Tongue Squire interpreting bird-flight; Late stage: Greenwing Warden protecting island paths with absolute devotion.

Sam: Sam: Young man, reckless minstrel fiercely protecting loved ones; Jodi's son; Very early stage: Castle scullion desperate to prove useful; Early stage: Court Piper all formal bravado; Middle stage: Royal Anthemist weaving coded signals; Dating stage: Favored Cantor dropping his jester-mask; Married stage: Sunrail Consort.
